query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customerExternalId) as qualifyingCustomers
FROM billing_items
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN voice and internet bundle%'
   OR description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
   OR description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied mobile broadband%'
   OR description LIKE 'ST- NBN%'
   OR description LIKE 'ST-NBN%'
